use_codes.desc: CLOLAR IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 TO 21 YEARS OLD WITH RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY ACUTE LYMPHOBLASTIC LEUKEMIA AFTER AT LEAST TWO PRIOR REGIMENS
